"CVSS:4.0/AV:L/AC:L/AT:N/PR:L/UI:N/VC:N/VI:N/VA:L/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N/E:P"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-705", "name": "Incorrect Control Flow Scoping"}], "description": "Versions of the package @tootallnate/once before 3.0.1 are vulnerable to Incorrect Control Flow Scoping in promise resolving when AbortSignal option is used. The Promise remains in a permanently pending state after the signal is aborted, causing any await or .then() usage to hang indefinitely. This can cause a control-flow leak that can lead to stalled requests, blocked workers, or degraded application availability.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00112, "percentile": 0.01633}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-vpq2-c234-7xj6", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-03-04T20:15:03Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-vpq2-c234-7xj6", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-vpq2-c234-7xj6"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-3449"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-03-03T05:17:25Z", "published_at": "2026-03-03T06:31:14Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-3449", "https://github.com/TooTallNate/once/issues/8", "https://github.com/TooTallNate/once/commit/b9f43cc5259bee2952d91ad3cdbd201a82df448a", "https://security.snyk.io/vuln/SNYK-JS-TOOTALLNATEONCE-15250612", "https://github.com/TooTallNate/once/releases/tag/v2.0.1", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-vpq2-c234-7xj6"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "low", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/TooTallNate/once", "summary": "@tootallnate/once vulnerable to Incorrect Control Flow Scoping", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-21T16:55:50Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-vpq2-c234-7xj6", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "3.0.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "@tootallnate/once"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 3.0.0, < 3.0.1"}, {"first_patched_version": "2.0.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "@tootallnate/once"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2.0.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
